artifacts.title: Kingston University London AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Draft evidence for Kingston University, London is based on official 2025/26 Kingston PDFs for academic integrity, AG2 editorial-help guidance, and a summary of regulation changes. The staged claims are limited to acknowledgement of AI contributions, the AR6 definition of unacceptable GenAI use, AG2 treatment of GenAI as editorial-help software, AG2 acknowledgement requirements, and source-status context for the 2025/26 changes.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The main www.kingston.ac.uk academic-integrity and policy-change pages returned Cloudflare challenge responses to direct HTTP fetches in this environment; no bypass was attempted.
Claims in this draft are based only on official source text from directly fetched Kingston PDFs and do not infer policy from research-publication pages or search snippets.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
